directive: ### Code Generation When modifying `backend/pkg/graph/schema.graphqls`, re-run the gqlgen command to regenerate resolver stubs. When modifying REST handler annotations, re-run swag to update Swagger docs. When modifying `frontend/src/graphql/*.graphql` query files, re-run `npm run graphql:generate` to update TypeScript types.
